details.test: Task 1: Buy 3 family-friendly Friday evening tickets under $35
Task 2: Purchase season membership under $200 with >=4 shows and guest ticket
Task 3: Sign up as usher for Saturday afternoon shift between 1–4 PM
Task 4: Register 15-year-old for July acting workshop under $400
Task 5: Buy $75 digital gift voucher for a friend
Task 6: Purchase 2 tickets (1 wheelchair + 1 companion) for accessible performance
Task 7: Reserve group booking of 12 tickets (prefer Sunday matinee with group discount)
Task 8: Explore past productions and subscribe to newsletter focusing on musicals
Task 9: One-time $60 donation to education programs in honor of someone
Checkout: Complete order with all items in cart
